text.en: If you control "Toon World": You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add to your hand or Set 1 "Toon" Trap from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Evil Box" once per turn. This card is treated as a Toon monster while "Toon World" is on the field. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card in either GY; place it on the bottom of the Deck.
